citation: Verlet, L. Phys. Rev. 136, A405 (1964). DOI: 10.1103/PhysRev.136.A405.
notes: Introduces the Verlet integration approach and early MD methodology for classical fluids.

citation: Rahman, A.; Stillinger, F. H. J. Chem. Phys. 55, 3336 (1971). DOI: 10.1063/1.1676585.
notes: Classic MD study of liquid water, establishing early benchmarks and analysis practices.

citation: Maier, J. A. et al. J. Chem. Theory Comput. DOI: 10.1021/ct400109a.
